name: Vicuna 13B v1.5
archDisplay: Llama-2-13B fine-tuned dense transformer (SFT on ShareGPT); a 16K-context variant was also released
note: Llama-2-13B fine-tuned on ~125K ShareGPT chats; the more-permissive, commercially-usable successor to the original LLaMA-based Vicuna.

results.notes: LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard snapshot, Dec 2023
Elo rating, Chatbot Arena Dec 2023 snapshot

MT-Bench score (GPT-4-judged, 0-10) from the same Chatbot Arena leaderboard Dec-2023 snapshot CSV already cited in this file for the MMLU (0.558) and Elo (1041) rows; fetched the CSV directly and confirmed the row 'Vicuna-13B,6.57,1041,0.558,Llama 2 Community' links to lmsys/vicuna-13b-v1.5.
EU21-MMLU, Thellmann et al. 2024, Table 13 ('Vicuna-13b-v1.5'). Matches this catalog entry's linked lmsys/vicuna-13b-v1.5 exactly.
25-shot ARC-Challenge acc_norm, Open LLM Leaderboard details run (harness|arc:challenge|25, acc_norm 0.56570).
10-shot HellaSwag acc_norm, Open LLM Leaderboard details run (harness|hellaswag|10, acc_norm 0.81089).
TruthfulQA MC2 (0-shot), Open LLM Leaderboard details run (harness|truthfulqa:mc|0, mc2 0.51074).
5-shot Winogrande accuracy, Open LLM Leaderboard details run (harness|winogrande|5, acc 0.74665).
5-shot GSM8K accuracy, Open LLM Leaderboard details run (harness|gsm8k|5, acc 0.11296).
3-shot DROP F1, Open LLM Leaderboard details run (harness|drop|3, f1 0.27734).

verificationNotes: Confirmed via huggingface.co/lmsys/vicuna-13b-v1.5 (Llama 2 Community License, fine-tuned from Llama 2 on ~125K ShareGPT conversations) and FastChat's vicuna_weights_version.md (v1.5 weights released 2023-08-01, matches releaseDate:2023-08). Fetched the cited leaderboard CSV directly and confirmed the exact row 'Vicuna-13B,6.57,1041,0.558,Llama 2 Community' — MMLU 0.558 (=55.8) and Elo 1041 both match the record precisely. No changes made.
